title: NIT Srinagar Notification 2026 - Apply for Junior Project Fellow/ Project Assistant Posts
description: National Institute of Technology Srinagar (NIT Srinagar) has declared the official notification for the recruitment of various Junior Project Fellow/ Project Assistant Jobs. Candidates who have completed their B.E/ B.Tech, M.E/ M.Tech in Civil Engineering can use this chance and apply for the NIT Srinagar Notification 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candida...
